div.p: This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-vacd/CodeSystem/ch-vacd-swissmedic-cs defines the following codes:

tr.td: FSME-Immun 0.25 ml Junior, Suspension zur intramuskulären Injektion, Pfizer AG
